task: Parse an AWS CloudWatch log entry and extract the timestamp, log level, and message using a regular expression
solution_criteria: The regex should correctly capture timestamp in ISO 8601 format, log level (INFO, ERROR, WARN, DEBUG), and the remaining message text from a standard CloudWatch log line

task: Write a Python function that validates an AWS S3 bucket name according to AWS naming rules (3-63 characters, lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens only, cannot start/end with hyphen)
solution_criteria: The function should return True for valid bucket names and False for invalid ones, handling all edge cases specified in AWS S3 bucket naming conventions

task: Create a JSON configuration object for an AWS IAM policy that grants read-only access to a specific S3 bucket and its contents
solution_criteria: The JSON should include proper IAM policy structure with Version, Statement array, Effect, Action, and Resource fields, allowing only s3:GetObject and s3:ListBucket permissions
